nasb.text: Then she said to the king, “It was a true report which I heard in my own land about your words and your wisdom.

esv.text: And she said to the king, “The report was true that I heard in my own land of your words and of your wisdom,

cnv.text: 於是她對王說：“我在本國聽見有關你的事和你的智慧，原來都是真的；

ccb.text: 她对所罗门说：“我在本国听到的有关你的功业和智慧原来都是真的。
